Jakarta Faces API v5.0-M1
  1. jakarta.faces.component.visit

Uses of Package
jakarta.faces.component.visit

Packages that use jakarta.faces.component.visit
Package
Description
jakarta.faces.component
 
jakarta.faces.component.search
 
jakarta.faces.component.visit
 
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.component.visit used by jakarta.faces.component
    Class
    Description
    VisitCallback
    A simple callback interface that enables taking action on a specific UIComponent (either facet or child) during a component tree visit.
    VisitContext
    A context object that is used to hold state relating to performing a component tree visit.
    VisitHint
    An enum that specifies hints that impact the behavior of a component tree visit.
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.component.visit used by jakarta.faces.component.search
    Class
    Description
    VisitHint
    An enum that specifies hints that impact the behavior of a component tree visit.
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.component.visit used by jakarta.faces.component.visit
    Class
    Description
    VisitCallback
    A simple callback interface that enables taking action on a specific UIComponent (either facet or child) during a component tree visit.
    VisitContext
    A context object that is used to hold state relating to performing a component tree visit.
    VisitContextFactory
    Provide for separation of interface and implementation for the VisitContext contract.
    VisitHint
    An enum that specifies hints that impact the behavior of a component tree visit.
    VisitResult
    An enum that specifies the possible results of a call to VisitCallback.visit(VisitContext, UIComponent).

Comments to: faces-dev@eclipse.org.
